description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a brick and siding exterior, featuring a prominent attached garage and a paved driveway. The house includes a covered front porch, a fenced backyard with green lawn, and several mature trees providing shade and landscaping. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior living spaces. The backyard is enclosed by a white picket fence and contains a patio area, likely for outdoor seating or recreation. The roof is primarily flat with some slight elevation changes, and the overall layout is open with visible interior rooms and hallways. The architectural style is reminiscent of a modern ranch home, emphasizing horizontal lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern ranch-style house with brick and siding exterior, attached garage, covered porch, and a fenced backyard with trees and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the attached garage, paved driveway, covered porch, and main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, additional windows, and the transition from driveway to backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio area, and mature trees within the green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard fence, more windows, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, and overhang supported by posts
